metadata.title: Excel Account1 Account2 Generator - Bulk Account Labels
metadata.description: Generate Account1, Account2, and bulk Excel account labels with formulas, padding, CSV previews, and no fill-handle dragging.

hero.title: Excel Account1 Account2 generator
hero.description: Create account labels for hundreds or hundreds of thousands of Excel rows without manually dragging the fill handle.

announcement.title: Best for account IDs, row labels, batch labels, and import lists

intent.title: Generate account labels without the manual Excel workaround
intent.description: For Account1 to Account400000 style labels, the fastest path is a formula you can paste into the first cell, or a copied preview when you need fixed values.

items.title: Prefix control
items.description: Use Account, Client, User, Invoice, Ticket, Batch, SKU, or any short label prefix.

items.title: Large row counts
items.description: Generate formulas for very large counts while keeping the browser preview limited and fast.

items.title: Optional padding
items.description: Switch from Account1 to Account0001 when imports or reports need fixed-width labels.

workflow.title: How to make Account1, Account2 labels in Excel
workflow.description: Use the generator for the formula, then paste the result into your workbook.

items.title: Enter Account as the prefix
items.description: Set the start number, row count, step, separator, and padding.

items.title: Copy the formula
items.description: Use SEQUENCE in Excel 365, or the ROW formula for older Excel versions.

items.title: Paste into the first cell
items.description: Let Excel fill the labels dynamically, or copy fixed preview values for imports.

related.title: Related Excel sequence pages
related.description: Move between the common search intents without losing the path back to the generator.

items.title: Excel sequence formula generator
items.description: For users who mainly need the SEQUENCE or ROW formula.

items.title: Excel autofill without dragging
items.description: For users trying to avoid long manual fill-handle operations.

items.title: Bulk row label generator
items.description: For labels beyond the Account naming pattern.

items.question: Can I generate Account1 through Account400000?
items.answer: Yes. Enter Account as the prefix, start at 1, set rows to 400000, and copy the generated Excel formula.

items.question: Can I generate Account-0001 labels?
items.answer: Yes. Use a hyphen separator and set zero padding to 4.

items.question: Does this edit my workbook?
items.answer: No. It only creates formulas and previews for you to copy.

cta.title: Generate your account label formula
cta.description: Open the free Excel generator and create the sequence pattern in seconds.
